task_title: Full system health check with artifacts

scores.justification: The final health report is well-structured with specific IDs (t019, u042, o102/o107/o115, p014/p037 in refunded orders, pipe-07 partial at 147/200) and concrete findings including pipeline statuses, search index freshness verification (36 paid vs 36 search, 34 refunded vs 34 search), cache issues (/docs/auth stale), 14 escalated tickets, 15 suspended users, and 3 flagged orders with amounts and currencies.
